form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. Previously first up won by 1.0 m when quickly away, (Fr3) at Riverina Paceway (2:04.70) beating Our Rebel Yell in NR up to 50 on February 28 2025 at $3.60. Gets the ace draw so looking for a strong return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over-raced during the middle stages of the event.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr6) over 1730m at this track, beaten 40 m by Go Easy On Me (2:04.40) in NR up to 55 M on March 27 at $26. Before that, was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr6) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 4th-5.4 beaten 5 m by Ratatattat (2:05.00) in NR up to 50 on March 11 at $17. Draws well so can be right there at the business end.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced upon straightening when Mammals Heartshifted outwards.
Had a tendency to over race throughout the event.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd (Fr2) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 1.75 m by Hall Most An Angel (2:08.50) in NR 40 to 45 on March 27 at $4.60. Expected to feature again.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr4) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 7th-8.84 beaten 10 m by Layla Shannon (2:05.30) in NR up to 52 M on April 1 at $21. form.formComment: Racing in great heart. Last start on from midfield and won by a head as favourite (Fr4) at Young (2:05.50) beating Rockin Sweet in NR 40 to 44 on March 24 at $1.33 at the bell was 4th-6.7. In form and looks a player again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced passing the 1100m when In Lexys Words broke gait.
Out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr8) over 1730m at this track, beaten 35 m by Hall Most An Angel (2:08.50) in NR 40 to 45 on March 27 at $8.50. Showed ability the race before when he raced just off the speed and boxed on; won by 2 m (Fr2) at Penrith (2:03.20) beating Tiger Eupheme in NR up to 47 on March 20 at $12 at the bell was 2nd-3.91. Worth another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced passing the 1400m when the speed in the event eased.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr7) over 2270m at Riverina Paceway was 8th-15.9 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Roll To The Top (2:45.60) in NR up to 48 on March 20 at $10. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced behind the tiring Shez A Warrior near the 200m.

form.formComment: Nine-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at this track and Dubbo. Last start won by 1.75 m when driven back in the field, (Fr5) held up early, at this track (2:08.50) beating Alta Downs in NR 40 to 45 on March 27 at $7.50. Expected to go on with it.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung inwards after the start was effected.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. At the latest first-up run 7th (Fr1) over 1770m at Canberra, beaten 15 m by Rainbow Mountain (2:12.20) in MAIDEN on March 16 2025 at $126. Probably needs this hitout.
